notes: Installer perf: rewrote the DMG downloader to use URLSessionDownloadDelegate instead of URLSession.bytes(for:). The previous version was yielding one byte at a time through Swift's async machinery (2M+ async yields for a 2MB DMG) — most of the install time was async overhead, not network. Now uses native chunked transfers. Helper poll tightened from 100ms to 50ms; removed an unnecessary 250ms pre-terminate sleep.
